topic: Manim CE scene authoring (v0.20.1, community edition)

coverage.note: not recorded — coverage completeness is unverified

falsification.question: Held-out Manim CE scene tasks - does the pack raise render-pass in the pinned container (manimcommunity/manim v0.20.1 by digest)?

experiment_1.metrics: render-pass in the pinned container, 300s timeout = FAIL; dual model (claude-haiku-4-5 primary, claude-sonnet-4-6 secondary); pre-registered before answers at commit a8bb596
experiment_1.verdict: primary (haiku) kp 3/5 > base 2/5 -> ships under pre-registered rule branch 1; secondary ties at ceiling

falsification.verdict: pack raises render-pass for the small model (haiku 3/5 vs 2/5), fixing a manimgl camera bleed and the animate-live-updater hang (which occurred in the wild in the base arm, 300s timeout); it does NOT raise render-pass for claude-sonnet-4-6 (tie 4/5). Known gaps at falsification time: Code() kwarg surface beyond code_string (both kp arms failed on font_size=), and Table data cells must stay strings (kp-haiku over-generalized the label beat). Both gaps closed 2026-07-07 by fixture-proven revision beats (code-fontsize, table-data-cells) added AFTER the experiment; the recorded numbers were measured on the 42-claim pack. Deepening round 2 (2026-07-09, docs/deepening/manim-round-2/, operator-directed domain: pixel-sprite animation) added 13 more claims (64 -> 77): image-resampling (RED pins the hallucinated filter_kwargs kwarg; haiku used no nearest-neighbor technique in any PNG-task answer vs sonnet crisp 11/12 (CE API 6/12, taught form 2x, PIL preprocessing 5/12; corrected in review round 1) - a render-blind one-sided gap), image-group (Group vs vector-only VGroup; second rule pinned under that TypeError, disclosed), color-constants (no bare BROWN), camera-follow (GREEN+doc, render-blind: both sonnet camera-follow probe tasks failed on video while passing the render gate; the beat's own first GREEN then omitted self.add(self.camera.frame), rendered exit 0 with a motionless camera, and was caught by hand-checking the remeasure - corrected pre-merge and verified on video), sprite-facing (GREEN+doc, render-blind: flip-mirror vs rotation). The programmatic-pixel-art territory was fully clean both models. Round-2 held-out delta is unmeasured until the next pre-registered falsification; remeasure numbers are tainted by construction. Deepening round 3 (2026-07-10, docs/deepening/manim-round-3/, gap-seeded: orbit, camera-follow, frame-bounds, sheet-slicing, parallax; sheet-slicing tasks mounted ONLY sprite_sheet.png) added 7 claims (77 -> 84): image-scale-height (GREEN+doc, render-blind: .scale(n) on a pixel-derived ImageMobject multiplies an already-tiny size and ships a speck — fired 3x in haiku's passing renders; set absolute size via the height property), rate-func-names (RED pins the observed NameError: name 'ease_out' is not defined — the easing family is suffixed, rate_functions.ease_out_sine), frame-fit (GREEN+doc, render-blind: size content against config.frame_height, not invented dimensions). Round-2 corrections measured as landed: the corrected camera-follow idiom appears in 6/6 follow answers (grep-verified) and tracks on video; the orbit-phase class did not recur under an inverted-phase diagnostic. DARK_GREEN NameError triaged loaded-rule-adjacent (color-constants beat already teaches the class). Round-3 held-out delta is unmeasured until the next pre-registered falsification; remeasure numbers are tainted by construction.

deepening.probe: 30 renders, pack-loaded arm: sonnet-4-6 15/15 render-pass, haiku-4-5 13/15; every PASS also hand-checked against its task text (render gate is API-shape-only)
deepening.note: Claims 48 -> 64. The falsification numbers recorded above were measured on the 42-claim pack; round-1 tier-1 remeasure is tainted by construction (tasks selected the beats) and is recorded only in the round ledger.
